overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game depicting a character walking through a dystopian urban underpass at dusk, passing mechanics working on a vintage green car, then emerging into a neon-lit plaza with futuristic skyscrapers, abandoned vehicles, and scattered NPCs.

events.description: mechanic closes the hood of the green car as camera approaches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark underpass toward the green car with open hood

second character standing beside the car observing

concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags
vintage green sedan with open hood revealing engine
scattered trash and rubble along the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark concrete underpass with graffiti-covered walls. The camera approaches a green vintage car with its hood open, where two characters are working. One mechanic closes the hood as the camera draws near, illuminated by artificial lights from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift shelter corridor with green neon lighting

agents.ego_description: moving past the car and through a narrow corridor lined with makeshift shelters

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a mattress near a metal cage shelter

entered.detail: improvised living spaces with blankets and metal cages
glowing green neon lights illuminating the corridor walls
metal fencing used as shelter walls

segments.scene_description: Moving past the green car, the camera enters a narrow corridor under the overpass lined with makeshift shelters illuminated by green neon lights. Metal cages and discarded mattresses line the path as the concrete structure shifts to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with neon signage and futuristic backdrop

events.description: exiting the covered underpass into the open plaza with visible sky
ambient light increases as natural dusk sky becomes visible above

agents.ego_description: emerging from the underpass and walking across the open plaza toward neon signs

notable_agents.action: group of people standing near the plaza entrance observing the area

entered.detail: large illuminated sign spelling HAVEN in pink neon letters
green neon cross and CHURCH signage on building facade
tall palm trees scattered throughout the plaza
tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows in the background
wrecked and burned-out vehicles parked along the right side
large armored military tank parked in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the underpass into a wide-open plaza at dusk, revealing a dramatic cityscape with futuristic skyscrapers. Large neon signs including HAVEN and CHURCH illuminate the scene, while palm trees and abandoned damaged cars populate the area. The sky becomes visible as the enclosed shelter gives way to the open air.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza stairs with military vehicle and burning barrel

events.description: camera begins ascending concrete stairs on the left side
military tank becomes prominently visible in the center of the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking toward and ascending concrete stairs while observing the plaza

notable_agents.action: woman with green hair leaning against a bollard
armed guard standing near the tank

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading upward on the left side

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera approaches concrete stairs on the left while a massive military tank dominates the center of the plaza. A woman with distinctive green hair stands near a bollard, and an armed guard is visible near the tank. The camera begins ascending the stairs as the CHURCH neon sign remains visible on the left, with futuristic buildings towering in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the claustrophobic depths of a concrete underpass into a sprawling, neon-lit cyberpunk plaza at dusk. It begins in a dark tunnel with graffiti-covered walls, moving toward a vintage green car where a mechanic closes the hood under artificial lights. As the camera pushes forward, the environment narrows into a corridor of makeshift shelters and metal cages bathed in green neon before the concrete structure recedes to the left. The scene then opens abruptly into a wide plaza, where the enclosed shelter gives way to a dramatic cityscape of towering skyscrapers and glowing signs for HAVEN and CHURCH. Finally, the camera passes abandoned cars and a massive military tank to approach a woman with green hair, ending as it begins to ascend a set of concrete stairs beneath the looming futuristic skyline.
